Question: By what percentage does the carbon flux at the Kolyma lowland permafrost acrotelm oxic hollow microbasin dominated by mangrove pneumatophores (Avicennia dominance) exceed the carbon flux at the Camargue ombrotrophic bog peat column apex beneath an alder carr closed canopy with a litter‑rich understorey, expressed relative to the Kolyma site's carbon flux ((Kolyma − Camargue) ÷ Kolyma × 100), based on 2015 measurements?

Question: What is the increase in methane emissions from the 2014 measurement at the PLT-LG-ridge-basin-05 geomorphic mosaic microplot (flat fen mat with micro-depressions dominated by sedge lawns; intermittent saturation with seasonal drawdown and oxic pulses) to the 2021 measurement at the PLT-UT-saltmarsh-panne-08 estuarine inundation microplot (subsurface lateral saturation pulses from adjacent aquifers; engineered berms and excavated borrow pits), expressed as a percentage of the 2021 estuarine measurement?
SQL Query: SELECT ((SELECT MethaneFlux FROM PeatlandMethaneInventory WHERE SamplePlot = "PLT-UT-saltmarsh-panne-08 estuarine inundation microplot" AND HydrologicSequencing = "subsurface lateral saturation pulses from adjacent aquifers" AND MicrotopographyDescriptor = "engineered berms and excavated borrow pits altering microrelief" AND MeasurementYear = "2021") - (SELECT MethaneFlux FROM PeatlandMethaneInventory WHERE SamplePlot = "PLT-LG-ridge-basin-05 geomorphic mosaic microplot" AND HydrologicSequencing = "intermittent saturation with seasonal drawdown and oxic pulses" AND MicrotopographyDescriptor = "flat fen mat with micro-depressions dominated by sedge lawns" AND MeasurementYear = "2014")) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT MethaneFlux FROM PeatlandMethaneInventory WHERE SamplePlot = "PLT-UT-saltmarsh-panne-08 estuarine inundation microplot" AND HydrologicSequencing = "subsurface lateral saturation pulses from adjacent aquifers" AND MicrotopographyDescriptor = "engineered berms and excavated borrow pits altering microrelief" AND MeasurementYear = "2021"), 0) AS MethaneFlux;

Question: What percentage of the lower-delta marsh station’s methane flux does the difference between that station and the mid-estuary mudflat represent? Specifically, calculate ((Measured CH4 flux at the subtidal vegetated rhizosphere with episodic oxygenation from roots at EST-LWR-007 lower-delta marsh station proximal to shipping channel during the "neap tide series july 2023 high-frequency sampling" with ancillary descriptor "microbial mat presence: phototrophic cyanobacterial veneer with EPS films") minus (Measured CH4 flux at the subtidal vegetated rhizosphere with episodic oxygenation from roots at EST-MD-013 mid-estuary mudflat profiler node near turbidity maximum during the "q3 2022 low-flow microphytobenthos bloom window" with ancillary descriptor "substrate heterogeneity: peat clast inclusions and shell hash forming microtopography")) × 100, divided by the EST-LWR-007 flux, expressed as a percentage.
SQL Query: SELECT ((SELECT MeasuredFluxValue FROM EstuarineFluxLedger WHERE StationarySourceID = "EST-LWR-007 lower-delta marsh station proximal to shipping channel" AND MonitoringPeriod = "neap tide series july 2023 high-frequency sampling" AND CompartmentalCategory = "subtidal vegetated rhizosphere with episodic oxygenation from roots" AND AncillaryDescriptor = "microbial mat presence: phototrophic cyanobacterial veneer with EPS films") - (SELECT MeasuredFluxValue FROM EstuarineFluxLedger WHERE StationarySourceID = "EST-MD-013 mid-estuary mudflat profiler node near turbidity maximum" AND MonitoringPeriod = "q3 2022 low-flow microphytobenthos bloom window" AND CompartmentalCategory = "subtidal vegetated rhizosphere with episodic oxygenation from roots" AND AncillaryDescriptor = "substrate heterogeneity: peat clast inclusions and shell hash forming microtopography")) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT MeasuredFluxValue FROM EstuarineFluxLedger WHERE StationarySourceID = "EST-LWR-007 lower-delta marsh station proximal to shipping channel" AND MonitoringPeriod = "neap tide series july 2023 high-frequency sampling" AND CompartmentalCategory = "subtidal vegetated rhizosphere with episodic oxygenation from roots" AND AncillaryDescriptor = "microbial mat presence: phototrophic cyanobacterial veneer with EPS films"), 0) AS MeasuredFluxValue;

Question: Compute the percentage change in organic carbon stored per hectare between the B-horizon illuvial clay- and Fe-enriched subsoil on coastal dunes (deltaic distributary channel levee and interdistributary bay facies; heathland dwarf shrub canopy with sparse tree recruitment) and the gleyed matrix horizon indicative of prolonged water saturation in a karstic sinkhole pond basin (saltmarsh halophytic prostrate mat with dwarf shrub inclusions), expressed relative to the coastal dune value (i.e., (coastal − sinkhole) / coastal × 100).
SQL Query: SELECT ((SELECT CarbonStockDensity FROM PedonCarbonRegister WHERE PlotRegistry = "PLT-ARC-001 coastal dune pedon with aeolian sand veneer" AND BiogeochemicalStratum = "B-horizon illuvial clay- and Fe-enriched subsoil with blocky structure" AND HydrogeomorphicSetting = "deltaic distributary channel levee and interdistributary bay facies" AND VegetationArchitectureClass = "heathland dwarf shrub canopy with sparse tree recruitment") - (SELECT CarbonStockDensity FROM PedonCarbonRegister WHERE PlotRegistry = "PLT-PLN-119 prairie relict pedon on calcareous loess mantle" AND BiogeochemicalStratum = "gleyed matrix horizon indicative of prolonged water saturation" AND HydrogeomorphicSetting = "karstic sinkhole pond basin with closed catchment hydrology" AND VegetationArchitectureClass = "saltmarsh halophytic prostrate mat with dwarf shrub inclusions")) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT CarbonStockDensity FROM PedonCarbonRegister WHERE PlotRegistry = "PLT-ARC-001 coastal dune pedon with aeolian sand veneer" AND BiogeochemicalStratum = "B-horizon illuvial clay- and Fe-enriched subsoil with blocky structure" AND HydrogeomorphicSetting = "deltaic distributary channel levee and interdistributary bay facies" AND VegetationArchitectureClass = "heathland dwarf shrub canopy with sparse tree recruitment"), 0) AS CarbonStockDensity;
